name: Elena Kowalski
role: Senior Database Engineer - SQL Server Specialist
summary: Database Engineer with 9+ years of experience specializing in Microsoft SQL Server administration, performance optimization, and high availability solutions. Expert in designing enterprise-grade database architectures, implementing Always On Availability Groups, and optimizing complex queries. Strong background in automation, disaster recovery planning, and ensuring data security compliance.

experience.title: Senior Database Engineer
bullets: Manage 150+ SQL Server instances across production, staging, and development environments
Architected Always On Availability Group deployment achieving 99.99% database uptime
Optimized critical stored procedures reducing execution time from 45 seconds to 2 seconds
Implemented comprehensive backup strategy with point-in-time recovery and geo-redundant storage
Led migration of 50+ databases to Azure SQL Managed Instance, reducing infrastructure costs by 40%
Designed and implemented CDC (Change Data Capture) solution for real-time data synchronization
Established database security standards including TDE encryption and row-level security policies
Automated routine DBA tasks using PowerShell and dbatools, saving 20+ hours per week
Mentored 2 junior DBAs and created comprehensive documentation and runbooks

experience.title: Database Administrator
bullets: Administered mission-critical SQL Server databases supporting €100M+ daily transactions
Implemented Query Store and automatic tuning, reducing query regressions by 75%
Designed disaster recovery solution with RPO < 5 minutes and RTO < 30 minutes
Built SSIS packages processing 10M+ records daily for data warehouse ETL
Performed database migrations from SQL Server 2014 to 2019 with zero downtime
Created performance baselines and capacity planning reports for infrastructure decisions
Implemented database audit logging for GDPR and financial compliance requirements

experience.title: Junior Database Administrator
bullets: Supported 50+ SQL Server databases across multiple client environments
Performed daily health checks, backup verification, and index maintenance
Developed T-SQL scripts for automated monitoring and alerting
Assisted in troubleshooting performance issues using execution plan analysis
Created documentation for database procedures and disaster recovery processes

education.institution: The Hague University of Applied Sciences

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Azure Database Administrator Associate (2023)
Microsoft Certified: SQL Server Database Administration (2021)
